versions.version_description: This original version is different than the Cat Powers cover version in that the chord progression is slightly different.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
For the key change play the chords on the 3rd, 4th and 6th frets.
You may like to slide the bar chords between the Db and Eb.


[Intro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
(strings)[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
Do you remember when we met[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]
That's the day I knew you were my pet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I want to tell ya, how much I love you[/tab]


[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]
Come with me my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]
To the sea, the sea of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna tell you, just how much I love you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Come with me, to the sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
of  love[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
Do you remember when we met[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]A7[/ch]
Oh, that's the day I knew you were my pet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I want to tell ya, oh how much I love you[/tab]


[Break]
[ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Bb7[/ch]
[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bb7[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]
Come with me, to the sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
of   love[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]
Come with me my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]Bb7[/ch]
To the sea, the sea of love[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Bb7[/ch]                  [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch]
I wanna tell you, just how much I love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                 [ch]Bb7[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
I want to tell ya, oh how much I love you[/tab]
